title: Augur
description: An agentic system that tracks security controls and compliance evidence, with an LLM agent that ingests policy documents and security-tool exports and maps findings onto SOC 2 and ISO 27001 controls.

title: FabTwin
tagline: Semiconductor SPC Analytics & Synthetic Fab Data
description: Open-source Statistical Process Control (SPC) analytics tool built around a synthetic semiconductor fab-data generator. Simulates lot-level process data across process steps with injected drift, shift, and variance scenarios, then validates them with a full SPC suite.

title: Patient Communication Simulator
description: A patient-conversation simulator built on LangGraph and LangChain for clinical-communication training, with personas and safety controls designed to prevent the system from emitting real medical advice.

title: JointWise
description: End-to-end medical-imaging platform combining a YOLOv11 stacking ensemble for ACL and meniscus tear detection from coronal knee MRI scans with a full-stack web application for uploading studies, running inference, and visualizing predictions.

title: BantayBayan
description: Offline-first Philippine disaster-response platform combining a Flutter mobile application with geospatial machine learning for flood probability and depth prediction, risk-aware navigation, emergency reporting, and safety guidance.
